response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software engineering experience and a strong background in distributed systems, his primary expertise lies in web technologies, Node.js, TypeScript, and DLang. He lacks the deep, recent C++ experience, industrial automation background, and specific cybersecurity knowledge (IEC 62443) required for this Senior C++ Digital Solutions role.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience with a strong focus on distributed systems and microservices.
Demonstrated leadership and architectural skills, including founding an open-source platform and holding Staff Engineer titles.
Strong background in Agile methodologies, Test-Driven Development (TDD), and CI/CD practices.
concerns: Extremely limited professional C++ and STL experience, consisting of only a 7-month role over 9 years ago.
Lacks exposure to industrial automation protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA) and IoT-specific development.
No demonstrated knowledge of the required Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards.
